summary:
EXECUTIVE READ
India activity concentrates in Colo and Build layers, led by Maharashtra, Telangana, Uttar Pradesh, and Karnataka as primary state targets. The top India policy hook is the UP cabinet-approved Data Centre Policy 2026 targeting Rs 2 lakh crore investment. Value-chain movers are hyperscalers expanding Colo capacity, with Amazon leading foreign hyperscaler moves at $48 billion. This run's foreign-hyperscaler India moves show Amazon, AirTrunk, Google, and Microsoft scaling established operations.

STATE PLAYS  🤖AI-draft:
Steer the prospect slate toward Maharashtra (P1, mature Mumbai/Navi Mumbai ecosystem), Telangana (P1, operator-friendly Hyderabad AI/cloud regime), and Uttar Pradesh (P1, aggressive NCR/inland cluster incentives targeting Rs 2 lakh crore investment). Karnataka (P2, Mangaluru coastal spoke plus Bengaluru demand) and Andhra Pradesh (P1, Vizag mega AI/hyperscale execution with DDL power-policy innovation) offer additional upside. Odisha is highlighted as an upside state with high policy confidence but thin execution for first-mover advantage.
